title: daemon.starting
text: Daemon is about to start HTTP. After config mutation and final config apply, before the router is served. Empty. lifecycle event hook

title: daemon.started
text: HTTP server is listening. After the TCP listener is bound and before serving requests. UTF-8 bytes of the listen address, e.g. 127.0.0.1:9090. lifecycle event hook

title: daemon.stopping
text: Daemon is shutting down. After the HTTP server stops, before plugin shutdown callbacks run. Empty. lifecycle event hook

title: config.loaded
text: Config file has been parsed. After plugin config.mutate hooks finish and final YAML is parsed. Post-mutation raw config.yml bytes. lifecycle event hook

title: plugin.loaded
text: A plugin finished initializing. Immediately after that plugin's init returns 0. UTF-8 bytes of the plugin name from its descriptor. lifecycle event hook

title: request.received
text: HTTP request entered the daemon middleware stack. Before the request is passed to route handlers. JSON: { request_id, client_ip, method, path, query }. lifecycle event hook

title: request.completed
text: HTTP request finished. After a response status is available. JSON: { request_id, client_ip, method, path, query, status, duration_ms }. lifecycle event hook

title: request.not_found
text: Request returned 404. After the fallback handler responds with not found. JSON: { request_id, client_ip, method, path, query }. lifecycle event hook

title: request.blocked
text: Probe protection blocked a request. Before a blocked client request is rejected. JSON: { request_id, client_ip, method, path, query }. lifecycle event hook

title: probe.client_blocked
text: Probe protection blocked a client IP. After the unknown route threshold is reached. JSON: { request_id, client_ip, unknown_hits, block_secs }. lifecycle event hook

title: auth.failed
text: Bearer authentication failed. After an authenticated route rejects a request. JSON: { request_id, client_ip, method, path, query }. lifecycle event hook

title: restart.scheduled
text: Daemon restart was queued. After plugin reload requests schedule a restart. JSON: { delay_ms, reason? }. lifecycle event hook

title: plugins.reload_requested
text: Plugin reload API was called. POST /api/system/plugins/reload accepted. JSON: { plugin_count, delay_ms }. lifecycle event hook

title: node.identity_generated
text: Node identity was generated. First boot with empty uuid/token_id/token fields. JSON: { uuid, token_id }. lifecycle event hook

title: plugins.config_mutated
text: Plugin config mutation changed raw YAML. After config.mutate hooks run and output differs from input. JSON: { hook_count, input_len, output_len }. lifecycle event hook

title: plugins.request_short_circuited
text: A request hook returned an HTTP response. request.intercept or middleware.inject returns REQUEST_RESPOND. JSON: { phase, method, path, status }. lifecycle event hook

title: plugins.json_response_mutated
text: A JSON response body hook changed a response. After json.response returns modified JSON. JSON: { method, path, input_len, output_len }. lifecycle event hook

title: plugins.json_actions_mutated
text: A JSON actions hook changed an actions array. After json.actions returns modified JSON. JSON: { method, path, input_len, output_len }. lifecycle event hook

title: plugins.route_invoked
text: A plugin route handled a request. After a route.register handler returns ROUTE_OK. JSON: { plugin, method, path, status }. lifecycle event hook

title: plugins.route_failed
text: A plugin route handler failed. After the handler returns a negative route status or request body read fails. JSON: { plugin, method, path, error }. lifecycle event hook

title: cloudpanel.site.create_requested
text: A site (webspace) create was requested. Before CloudPanel command hooks run for site:add:* operations. JSON: { operation, command, args, siteType?, status?, duration_ms, error?, hook_handlers }. lifecycle event hook

title: cloudpanel.site.created
text: A site (webspace) was created successfully. After clpctl exits successfully for site:add:* operations. JSON: { operation, command, args, siteType?, status?, duration_ms, error?, hook_handlers }. lifecycle event hook

title: cloudpanel.site.create_failed
text: A site (webspace) create failed or was cancelled. After hooks cancel site creation or clpctl exits with an error. JSON: { operation, command, args, siteType?, status?, duration_ms, error?, hook_handlers }. lifecycle event hook

title: cloudpanel.site.delete_requested
text: A site (webspace) delete was requested. Before CloudPanel command hooks run for site:delete. JSON: { operation, command, args, siteType?, status?, duration_ms, error?, hook_handlers }. lifecycle event hook

title: cloudpanel.site.deleted
text: A site (webspace) was deleted successfully. After clpctl exits successfully for site:delete. JSON: { operation, command, args, siteType?, status?, duration_ms, error?, hook_handlers }. lifecycle event hook

title: cloudpanel.site.delete_failed
text: A site (webspace) delete failed or was cancelled. After hooks cancel site deletion or clpctl exits with an error. JSON: { operation, command, args, siteType?, status?, duration_ms, error?, hook_handlers }. lifecycle event hook

title: cloudpanel.database.create_requested
text: A database create was requested. Before CloudPanel command hooks run for db:add. JSON: { operation, command, args, siteType?, status?, duration_ms, error?, hook_handlers }. lifecycle event hook

title: cloudpanel.database.created

title: cloudpanel.database.create_failed

title: cloudpanel.database.delete_requested

title: cloudpanel.database.deleted
text: A database was deleted successfully. After clpctl exits successfully for db:delete. JSON: { operation, command, args, siteType?, status?, duration_ms, error?, hook_handlers }. lifecycle event hook

title: cloudpanel.database.delete_failed
text: A database delete failed or was cancelled. After hooks cancel database deletion or clpctl exits with an error. JSON: { operation, command, args, siteType?, status?, duration_ms, error?, hook_handlers }. lifecycle event hook

title: cloudpanel.database.export_requested
text: A database export was requested. Before CloudPanel command hooks run for db:export. JSON: { operation, command, args, siteType?, status?, duration_ms, error?, hook_handlers }. lifecycle event hook

title: cloudpanel.database.exported
text: A database was exported successfully. After clpctl exits successfully for db:export. JSON: { operation, command, args, siteType?, status?, duration_ms, error?, hook_handlers }. lifecycle event hook

title: cloudpanel.database.export_failed
text: A database export failed or was cancelled. After hooks cancel the export or clpctl exits with an error. JSON: { operation, command, args, siteType?, status?, duration_ms, error?, hook_handlers }. lifecycle event hook

title: cloudpanel.user.password_reset_requested
text: A user password reset was requested. Before CloudPanel command hooks run for user:reset:password. JSON: { operation, command, args, siteType?, status?, duration_ms, error?, hook_handlers }. lifecycle event hook

title: cloudpanel.user.password_reset
text: A user password was reset successfully. After clpctl exits successfully for user:reset:password. JSON: { operation, command, args, siteType?, status?, duration_ms, error?, hook_handlers }. lifecycle event hook

title: cloudpanel.user.password_reset_failed
text: A user password reset failed or was cancelled. After hooks cancel the reset or clpctl exits with an error. JSON: { operation, command, args, siteType?, status?, duration_ms, error?, hook_handlers }. lifecycle event hook

title: cloudpanel.user.mfa_disable_requested
text: A user MFA disable was requested. Before CloudPanel command hooks run for user:disable:mfa. JSON: { operation, command, args, siteType?, status?, duration_ms, error?, hook_handlers }. lifecycle event hook

title: cloudpanel.user.mfa_disabled
text: User MFA was disabled successfully. After clpctl exits successfully for user:disable:mfa. JSON: { operation, command, args, siteType?, status?, duration_ms, error?, hook_handlers }. lifecycle event hook

title: cloudpanel.user.mfa_disable_failed
text: A user MFA disable failed or was cancelled. After hooks cancel MFA disable or clpctl exits with an error. JSON: { operation, command, args, siteType?, status?, duration_ms, error?, hook_handlers }. lifecycle event hook

title: cloudpanel.certificate.install_requested
text: A Let's Encrypt certificate install was requested. Before CloudPanel command hooks run for lets-encrypt:install:certificate. JSON: { operation, command, args, siteType?, status?, duration_ms, error?, hook_handlers }. lifecycle event hook

title: cloudpanel.certificate.installed
text: A Let's Encrypt certificate was installed successfully. After clpctl exits successfully for lets-encrypt:install:certificate. JSON: { operation, command, args, siteType?, status?, duration_ms, error?, hook_handlers }. lifecycle event hook

title: cloudpanel.certificate.install_failed
text: A certificate install failed or was cancelled. After hooks cancel the install or clpctl exits with an error. JSON: { operation, command, args, siteType?, status?, duration_ms, error?, hook_handlers }. lifecycle event hook

title: cloudpanel.vhost_templates.import_requested
text: A vhost template import was requested. Before CloudPanel command hooks run for vhost-templates:import. JSON: { operation, command, args, siteType?, status?, duration_ms, error?, hook_handlers }. lifecycle event hook

title: cloudpanel.vhost_templates.imported
text: Vhost templates were imported successfully. After clpctl exits successfully for vhost-templates:import. JSON: { operation, command, args, siteType?, status?, duration_ms, error?, hook_handlers }. lifecycle event hook

title: cloudpanel.vhost_templates.import_failed
text: A vhost template import failed or was cancelled. After hooks cancel the import or clpctl exits with an error. JSON: { operation, command, args, siteType?, status?, duration_ms, error?, hook_handlers }. lifecycle event hook

title: config.mutate
text: Rewrite config YAML before FeatherFly applies settings. After all plugins init, before directories/logging/pid are created. config yaml mutation

title: request.intercept
text: Inspect inbound HTTP requests before handlers run. Runs before middleware.inject and before Axum handlers. request hook HTTP

title: middleware.inject
text: Inner request middleware layer before handlers. Runs after intercept hooks on the same route prefix. request hook HTTP

title: route.register
text: Expose new HTTP routes on the daemon router. Plugin routes merge into the main Axum router alongside core API routes. plugin HTTP route

title: json.response
text: Mutate the entire JSON response object. Serialized JSON response body bytes. Prefix match on request path. Examples: `/api/system`, `/api`, `*`. json hook mutation

title: json.actions
text: Mutate only the top-level actions array. Serialized JSON array from the response actions field, or [] when absent. Same prefix rules as json.response. json hook mutation
